MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, For Summary Adjudication Of Issues
Off Calendar Jul-11-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Albert Boasberg, Esq. (650-755-6960) for Plaintiff.
Allison Chua, Esq. (949-381-5900) of McGlinchey Stafford for Defendant.

RULING - ARGUED. Hearing is held. The Court asks Defendant to address Plaintiff's declaration re: denial of receiving the money. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT ROUNDPOINT MORTGAGE SERVICING CORPORATION's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, For Summary Adjudication Of Issues is taken under submission. (as fully reported in the reporter's nnotes.) Judge: Stephen Murphy, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 711, ckaren@sftc.org =(302/SM)
